hero.badge: ✨ The new era of intelligent management
hero.eyebrow: Built for operations that cannot stop.
hero.subtitle: No more lost spreadsheets and last-minute corrective maintenance. Rolvix centralizes PMOC, work orders, and assets in one flow — with compliance built in, without the manual grind.

bridge.title: Your operation in sync.
bridge.description: Rolvix acts as the nervous system of your business. It gathers the loose ends of your operation — what used to be a spreadsheet, email, or oversight — and integrates everything into central intelligence, ready to be put into action.

tempo1.title: Stop reacting. Start predicting.
tempo1.description: Managing assets with spreadsheets is gambling. You lose history, forget reviews, and end up paying far more for emergency repairs. Your time and your team's time should not be spent only putting out fires.
tempo1.description2: We create an environment where operations nearly manage themselves. Your inventory and PMOC become a living data flow. The system cross-checks information and alerts your team the moment a part needs attention, before a failure can stop your business.
tempo1.description3: Less downtime, compliance that protects you from fines, and a sharp reduction in maintenance costs. The result is not just organization. It is profit on the last line of your financial statement.

tempo2.title: One system. Everyone connected.
tempo2.description: The technician sees the wrong priority because nobody updated the board. The manager only learns a deadline slipped when the customer calls to complain. And whoever signs the checks sees all of it a month later, in a report that can no longer drive a decision.
tempo2.description2: In Rolvix, each person sees exactly what they need to do the job — no more, no less. The technician gets the right work order on their phone. The manager tracks every crew in real time. Decision-makers see the full picture without waiting on another spreadsheet.
tempo2.description3: The result is not just visibility — it is an operation that moves together, from the floor to the boardroom, without anyone asking "so, where does this stand?" again.

tempo3.title: Audits are not surprises. They are routine.
tempo3.description: Inspectors show up unannounced and the PMOC report is missing from a folder nobody remembers. Every missing record is not just a hassle — it is a fine waiting for the right date.
tempo3.description2: Rolvix logs each asset's history automatically: who did what, when, with which part, with photo and signature attached. Nothing depends on someone remembering to fill a spreadsheet.
tempo3.description3: On the next inspection visit, you do not chase paperwork — you export the report in seconds and show an operation that is current, without drama, without panic.

bridge.text: That is only the foundation. See how Rolvix fits your type of operation.

stepTwo.technicianDetail: The right order on the phone, with clear priority.
stepTwo.managerDetail: Crews and deadlines in real time — no status hunting.
stepTwo.directorDetail: Full operational picture without waiting on a monthly report.

cta.microcopy: No credit card · Live in minutes

solutions.title: Built for your operation — not a generic customer.
solutions.subtitle: Pick the scenario that looks most like your day-to-day.

buildings.title: Commercial buildings and condominiums
buildings.pain: PMOC is mandatory, but nobody in the building has time to keep up.
buildings.cta: See how it works for condominiums

multiUnit.title: Networks with multiple units
multiUnit.pain: Every unit runs differently. Without a central system, you cannot tell which one is at risk.
multiUnit.cta: See how it works for networks

industry.title: Industry and plant
industry.pain: A stopped machine costs more than any maintenance plan you postponed.
industry.cta: See how it works for industry

platform.title: Not just a maintenance app. The backbone of your operation.
platform.subtitle: Built to grow with you — isolated data and modules that turn on when you need them.

isolation.title: Your data stays yours
isolation.body: Every customer runs in an isolated space. No other tenant sees what belongs to your operation.

modular.title: Grows at your pace
modular.body: Turn on what you need, when you need it — without switching systems when the operation changes size.

solid.title: Serious enough to scale
solid.body: Role permissions, organized units, and auditable history — a base for operations that cannot improvise.

pricing.title: Pick a plan. Start without drama.
pricing.subtitle: Clear trial, easy exit, no fine print hiding in the middle of the path.
pricing.reassurance: Cancel anytime. Your data is yours.

starter.name: Starter
starter.blurb: Validate PMOC and work orders in one unit.

operations.name: Operations
operations.blurb: For teams that live on maintenance and compliance.

scale.name: Scale
scale.blurb: For networks that need central control.

card.q: Do I need a credit card to try it?
card.a: No. You start the trial without a card and only decide later if it fits the operation.

data.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
data.a: Your data stays yours. You can export what you need before closing — we do not hold your operation hostage to a spreadsheet.

goLive.a: Lean operations go live in minutes. Larger networks get guided onboarding so history is not lost on the way.

closing.title: Stop operating in the dark.
closing.subtitle: Every day without control is another outdated spreadsheet, another lost work order, another risk that only shows up when it is already late. Start now — or talk to someone who has helped operations like yours leave the blackout behind.

footer.tagline: Asset ops, PMOC, and work orders in one flow.
